title: Pokemon Towns [Cobblemon]
description: Adds in villages and towns that spawn into the world including pokecenters too
body:
Pokemon Towns for Cobblemon

 

 Dependencies:

This addon NEEDS to be placed in the DATAPACK FOLDER within your world folder. 

 

OTHER MODS REQUIRED:

  • macaws windows
  • macaws curtains
  • macaws roofs
  • cobblemon.

 

More mods are planned to be used in the future, all of which will be included in the modpack.

(modpack under construction)

This mod adds Pokecentres that randomly spawn in the world, along with houses, battlefields and pokemarts. using the same logic as normal minecraft villages do. The models are designed by me, and made to emulate the look of buildings and the pixel art from the earlier pokemon games.

 

there are buildings like normal houses, poke centres, battle arenas, and cities, aparment buildings and more.

The roads are also designed to reflect the buildings they connect to.
the houses have different colors and the chance for what building in what styles are randomized. some more rare than other.

 

 

 

Planned updates / Roadmap:
  • NPCs in the style of pokemon characters
  • Gyms
  • Farms
  • Game corner & more misc buildings

 

 

Screenshots:

 

These screenshot might not represent the pack the best. As it would differ based on your FOV and resolution.
